server_side.description: Node.js/Express server-side prototype pollution via JSON body merge operations

payloads.description: Basic __proto__ detection — pollutes Object.prototype with canary value
Constructor path pollution — alternative to __proto__ that bypasses some filters
Status code pollution — overrides default HTTP status in Express/Koa responses
Privilege escalation — pollutes admin property checked in authorization logic
Privilege escalation variant — common isAdmin property used in access control
RCE via child_process.spawn — pollutes shell/argv used by execSync or spawn

client_side.description: Client-side prototype pollution via URL query parameters or hash fragments

payloads.description: Query param pollution — exploits vulnerable URL parsers (qs, query-string)
Hash fragment pollution — bypasses server-side WAF since hash is client-only
DOM gadget via innerHTML — triggers XSS when polluted property is used in DOM
Script src gadget — injects external script via polluted src property
Constructor path via query params — bypasses __proto__ keyword filters
Iframe srcdoc gadget — injects script content via polluted iframe srcdoc attribute

nested_bypass.description: Bypass prototype pollution filters via nested objects and obfuscation

payloads.description: Nested object pollution — bypasses shallow key checks that only inspect top-level keys
Concatenation bypass — exploits string normalization that strips inner __proto__
Array wrapper — bypasses filters that only check plain object inputs
Deep constructor chain — bypasses single-depth prototype checks

postmessage.description: Prototype pollution via window.postMessage cross-origin messaging

payloads.description: JSON merge via postMessage — exploits message handlers that merge received data
Config message pollution — targets handlers that merge config/settings objects
Script src gadget via postMessage — targets handlers that create script elements from message data
innerHTML gadget via postMessage — exploits code that sets innerHTML from polluted property
Origin bypass via href pollution — exploits postMessage handlers that check origin from object property

ejs_rce.description: EJS template engine RCE via prototype pollution — pollute rendering options to inject code

payloads.description: EJS outputFunctionName RCE — injects code via template compilation option, executes during render()
EJS escapeFunction RCE — overrides escape function to execute arbitrary code
EJS client mode RCE — enables client mode and overrides escape for code execution
Express view options pollution — targets Express apps using EJS via settings object

gadget_discovery.description: Framework-specific prototype pollution gadgets for privilege escalation and RCE in Node.js frameworks

payloads.description: Express env gadget — pollutes process environment to load malicious module on child_process spawn
Express Handlebars gadget — disables known helpers restriction to enable SSTI in templates
Handlebars prototype access gadget — re-enables __proto__ access in Handlebars 4.6+ templates
Fastify reply decorator gadget — deep pollution chain targeting Fastify reply decoration system
Koa/Hapi auth bypass gadget — pollutes authentication state checked by auth middleware
